paper_title: Study on Allergic Rhinitis and Multi-Allergen Sensitisation

methods.description: Process for selecting and screening outpatients with symptoms of allergic rhinitis for inclusion in the study. This method ensures that the study population meets specific diagnostic and sensitization criteria, while excluding those with immunodeficiency or prior allergen-specific immunotherapy.

steps.description: 170 outpatients with symptoms of allergic rhinitis from the Allergy Center of the First Affiliated Hospital of Guangzhou Medical University were screened between January 2017 and December 2018.
steps.searchable_summary: screen outpatients with allergic rhinitis symptoms

steps.description: The included patients fulfilled the following criteria: (1) a physician diagnosis of asthma, rhinitis, or chronic cough; and (2) positive sIgE reactivity to two or more indoor and outdoor inhalant allergen extracts.
steps.searchable_summary: filter patients based on diagnosis and sIgE reactivity

steps.description: The exclusion criteria were immunodeficiency and a history of treatment with allergen-specific immunotherapy.
steps.searchable_summary: exclude patients with immunodeficiency or prior immunotherapy

steps.description: The study was carried out with the approval of the ethics committee of the First Affiliated Hospital of Guangzhou Medical University (GYFYY-2017-18).
Written informed consent was collected from all the patients. For subjects younger than 18 years of age, written informed consents were obtained from their parents or legal guardian.
steps.searchable_summary: collect informed consent from patients or guardians
